# Contributors

Thank you to everyone who has contributed to this project!

## How to Add Yourself

If you've contributed to this project, feel free to add yourself to the list below via a pull request.

## Contribution Types

| Emoji | Type                |
| ----- | ------------------- |
| 💻    | Code                |
| 📖    | Documentation       |
| 🐛    | Bug Reports         |
| 💡    | Ideas & Suggestions |
| 🎨    | Design              |
| ⚠️    | Tests               |
| 🔧    | Maintenance         |
| 👀    | Review              |
